decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.
Week ending 2026-06-13. Best: v2_hook (+0v). Worst: v3_answer (+0v).

v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q) was stale SCHEDULED in state but published 06-15 and is now the top performer (320v, 60.3% avg-viewed, 95.9% Shorts feed). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at. Wrote fresh real-number stats snapshot to stats_log.csv from authenticated Studio.

POSITIVE: v3 Tunguska LONG-FORM crossed 100v (112v, 102 unique, 1.7k impressions, 3.1% CTR) via Browse 50% + Suggested 44.6% (96.4% of impressions = YT recommending). Co-listed beside established docu channels. Cold-start long-form suppression has LIFTED organically (~J+20-30, no external seed). Overturns KNOWN_BAD 'long-forms 0v under persistent suppression'.

OPERATIONAL: routine outage — no automated run since 2026-06-13 (15 days). No pulse/daily/weekly, Shorts pipeline dry since 06-15, v4 Roanoke blocked since 06-13. Re-arm cron + unblock v4 = P0 next week.

28d: 1,367 views / 18.7h / +3 subs / 650 monthly audience; last 48h only 8 views (plateau). Demo 100% male, 79.3% aged 65+. Best Short briggs 320v (question hook, 60.3% viewed). Worst v2_answer 34v (12.7% viewed retention cliff, ANSWER clip with no standalone hook). No sub milestone (still <50). Report: seeds/weekly-reports/2026-06-28.md.
